mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_ENROLLMENT ( USER_ID, COURSE_SN, ORD_SN, ACCS_STRT_DT, ACCS_END_DT, ENRL_STAT_CD ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseSn}, #{ordSn}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 12), 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_ENROLLMENT SET ACCS_END_DT = ADD_MONTHS(GREATEST(ACCS_END_DT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), 12), ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE', ORD_SN = #{ordSn}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.select: SELECT e.ENRL_SN, e.USER_ID, e.COURSE_SN, e.ORD_SN, e.ACCS_STRT_DT, e.ACCS_END_DT, e.ENRL_STAT_CD, e.REG_DT, e.MDFCN_DT, c.COURSE_NM, c.THMB_IMG, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_NM, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(NVL(l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0)) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(100, SUM(NVL(p.SECONDS_WATCHED, 0)) / SUM(NVL(l.LECTURE_DURATION, 0)) * 100) END ) AS PROGRESS_PCT FROM COURSE_ENROLLMENT e JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_SN = e.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = c.INSTR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON s.SUBJ_ID = c.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON sc.SUBJ_CL_ID = s.SUBJ_CL_ID LEFT JOIN LECTURE l ON l.COURSE_SN = e.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN LECTURE_PROGRESS p ON p.LECTURE_SN = l.LECTURE_SN AND p.USER_ID = e.USER_ID WHERE e.USER_ID = #{userId} AND e.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY e.ENRL_SN, e.USER_ID, e.COURSE_SN, e.ORD_SN, e.ACCS_STRT_DT, e.ACCS_END_DT, e.ENRL_STAT_CD, e.REG_DT, e.MDFCN_DT, c.COURSE_NM, c.THMB_IMG, m.USER_NAME, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM ORDER BY e.ACCS_STRT_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_ENROLLMENT SET ENRL_STAT_CD = 'REVOKED', MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE'
